name: basic_session
description: E63 default end-to-end scenario. Each event is replayed on the reliable DataChannel at t seconds after the channel opens. transcript events are final device ASR segments (LiveTransportBridge.SendTranscriptSegment schema); is_command=true routes them through the PC IntentRouter (on_device_transcript). Covers the main intents: what_is, spatial (ou est X), read text, owner/attribute enrollment (retiens c'est Karim), memory question, replay, and hide/show all.

events.text: interroge ma memoire qui est Karim
